questions.question: Explain the key difference between the chalk and talk method and the PowerPoint presentation process, particularly in terms of student engagement and interaction.
questions.hint: Focus on the interactive aspects of both methods

questions.question: A lecturer uses the chalk and talk method to teach a linear algebra module, but finds that students are not taking notes and are not participating in class discussions. What adjustments could the lecturer make to improve student engagement and learning outcomes?
questions.hint: Consider the role of visual aids and groupwork in the chalk and talk method

questions.question: Describe the benefits and limitations of using PowerPoint presentations in a linear algebra module, in terms of student learning and assessment outcomes.
questions.hint: Consider the trade-offs between visual aids and hands-on learning
